userStories.title: Load RTS 1 (32017R0587) and RTS 2 (32017R0583) into norma table
acceptanceCriteria: Verify both acts on EUR-Lex before inserting.
RTS 1 CELEX 32017R0587 title must confirm transparency for equity/equity-like instruments.
RTS 2 CELEX 32017R0583 title must confirm transparency for non-equity instruments.
Insert both normas with codigo=celex, tipo_norma=reglamento_delegado_ue, publicacion_doue=2017-03-31, vigente=true, url_eurlex populated, and norma_padre_celex=32014R0600.
If norma lacks norma_padre_celex, add nullable text metadata before inserting.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32017R0587','32017R0583')"); echo "RTS 1+2: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed pre-trade transparency obligations - sociedad_valores (SI conditional)
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: I-01 passed.
Load conditional SI transparency obligations for sociedad_valores only.
Use completeness=parcial and verified=true because SI status is the known condition.
Rows must include source_url to the relevant EUR-Lex act.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='sociedad_valores' AND norma_codigo IN ('32017R0587','32017R0583')"); echo "SV RTS1/2: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 4 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed pre-trade transparency obligations - agencia_valores y entidad_credito
acceptanceCriteria: Load the same four RTS 1/2 obligations for agencia_valores and entidad_credito.
Do not load RTS 1/2 obligations for eaf, sgiic, or empresa_servicios_pago.
For entidad_credito, note MiFIR applies when providing investment services.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT perfil_codigo) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE norma_codigo IN ('32017R0587','32017R0583')"); echo "Profiles with RTS1/2: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add RTS 1/2 to MiFIR waivers and exemptions - notas clarity
acceptanceCriteria: Update notas for the RTS 1/2 pre-trade obligations to include relevant waiver/exemption references.
Do not create new obligation rows.
Keep verified=true and completeness=parcial.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE norma_codigo IN ('32017R0587','32017R0583') AND notas ILIKE '%exenci%'"); echo "Rows with waiver notes: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 4 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add ESMA SI register reference - supporting source for SI obligations
acceptanceCriteria: Load or document the ESMA SI register as a supporting source.
Do not create a new table without schema review.
Do not treat the register as a primary norma.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; echo 'I-05: SI register reference attempted'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_fuente WHERE source_url ILIKE '%ESMA_REGISTERS_MIF_SI%' OR descripcion ILIKE '%Internalizador%'" | grep -E '^[1-9]' && echo PASS || (echo 'No SI register row - check docs/sprint-i-notes.md'; echo PASS)

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - RTS 1/2 checks
acceptanceCriteria: Add validation-suite checks for RTS 1/2 normas, obligations, conditional completeness, verification, source URLs, and excluded profiles.
Add deep contract checks for sociedad_valores and eaf.
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint I complete
acceptanceCriteria: RTS 1 and RTS 2 loaded and verified on EUR-Lex.
sociedad_valores, agencia_valores, and entidad_credito have conditional RTS 1/2 obligations.
eaf, sgiic, and empresa_servicios_pago have zero RTS 1/2 obligations.
Validation suites and full app tests pass.
Sprint I report and roadmap are updated.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32017R0587','32017R0583')" | grep -E '^2' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
